name: historical_notes
Battle of Pharsalus: Compressed Pharsalus field battle: Caesar's smaller veteran army faces Pompey's larger line; Pompey's cavalry mass is on one flank while Caesar keeps a hidden fourth line ready to counter it.

name: ROMAN
column4: press the veteran legions forward while the fourth line waits to spear Pompey's cavalry flank
column5: break the cavalry envelopment and then roll up the infantry line

name: POMPEIAN
column4: hold the infantry line steady and use the superior cavalry mass to turn Caesar's exposed flank
column5: win by enveloping Caesar's smaller army from the flank
